name: Chronicle 2.0
tagline: AI-powered presentations that actually look like a human made them.
problem: Generic AI presentation tools produce bland, template-heavy slides that undermine credibility and brand identity. Chronicle 2.0 addresses the 'AI slop' problem by generating polished, design-forward decks that retain a professional human feel. This saves teams significant time without sacrificing the visual quality stakeholders expect.
useCases: Building investor pitch decks with a refined, branded aesthetic
Creating client-facing sales presentations quickly from existing content
Producing internal strategy or roadmap decks without designer support
Repurposing reports or docs into visually compelling slide narratives
